mapper.select: /* AdminMainMapper.selectPopupList */ SELECT A.POPUP_SEQ AS popupSeq ,A.POPUP_SJ AS popupSj ,A.POPUP_URL AS popupUrl ,A.ATCHFILENO AS atchfileno ,A.POPUP_WIDTH_LC AS popupWidthLc ,A.POPUP_HEIGHT_LC AS popupHeightLc ,A.POPUP_WIDTH AS popupWidth ,A.POPUP_HEIGHT AS popupHeight ,A.BGNDE_DE AS bgndeDe ,A.END_DE AS endDe ,A.POPUP_ORDR AS popupOrdr ,A.POPUP_CN AS popupCn ,A.POPUP_TY AS popupTy ,A.POPUP_SE AS popupSe ,B.SVFILENM AS svfilenm FROM TB_MAIN_POPUP A LEFT JOIN TB_FILE_INFO B ON A.ATCHFILENO = B.ATCHFILENO WHERE A.SITE_CODE = 'admin' AND A.USE_YN = 'Y' AND DATE_FORMAT(now(), '%Y-%m-%d') BETWEEN A.BGNDE_DE AND A.END_DE

/* AdminMainMapper.selectPopup */ SELECT A.POPUP_SEQ AS popupSeq ,A.POPUP_SJ AS popupSj ,A.POPUP_URL AS popupUrl ,A.ATCHFILENO AS atchfileno ,A.POPUP_WIDTH_LC AS popupWidthLc ,A.POPUP_HEIGHT_LC AS popupHeightLc ,A.POPUP_WIDTH AS popupWidth ,A.POPUP_HEIGHT AS popupHeight ,A.BGNDE_DE AS bgndeDe ,A.END_DE AS endDe ,A.POPUP_ORDR AS popupOrdr ,A.POPUP_CN AS popupCn ,A.POPUP_TY AS popupTy ,A.POPUP_SE AS popupSe ,B.SVFILENM AS svfilenm FROM TB_MAIN_POPUP A LEFT JOIN TB_FILE_INFO B ON A.ATCHFILENO = B.ATCHFILENO WHERE A.POPUP_SEQ = #{popupSeq}

/* AdminMainMapper.selectIndexTop */ SELECT (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TB_USER_INFO) AS userCnt ,(SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TB_LOGIN_HIS WHERE DATE_FORMAT(LOGIN_DT, '%Y-%m-%d') = DATE_FORMAT(now(), '%Y-%m-%d')) AS logCnt ,(SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TB_BOARD_MST) AS boardCnt ,(SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TB_MAIN_POPUP WHERE DATE_FORMAT(now(), '%Y-%m-%d') BETWEEN BGNDE_DE AND END_DE AND USE_YN = 'Y') AS popupCnt

/* AdminMainMapper.selectIndexMemberList */ SELECT MEMBER_ID AS memberId ,MEMBER_NM AS memberNm ,MASTER_CODE AS masterCode ,JOIN_DE AS joinDe ,USE_YN AS useYn FROM TB_USER_INFO ORDER BY JOIN_DE DESC LIMIT 0,5

/* AdminMainMapper.selectBbsList */ SELECT BBS_SEQ AS bbsSeq ,NTT_SEQ AS nttSeq ,NTT_SJ AS nttSj ,DATE_FORMAT(REG_DT, '%Y-%m-%d') AS regDt FROM TB_BOARD WHERE BBS_SEQ = #{bbsSeq} AND DEL_YN = 'N' ORDER BY REG_DT DESC LIMIT 0,5
